summary: Menu changes and Help Center redesign verified - All features working correctly. Tools section has Phone/Dialer removed, Campaigns section reordered with Campaign Dashboard before Broadcast, Settings section has Notifications and SMS/Email Toggle removed. Help Center redesign complete with search bar (no category pills) and AI chat powered by GPT-5.2.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Menu changes verified: Tools section (Team Chat, Tasks & Reminders, Ask Jessi, Training Hub - NO Phone/Dialer), Campaigns section (SMS Campaigns, Email Campaigns, Campaign Dashboard, Broadcast, Date Triggers - Dashboard BEFORE Broadcast), Settings section (Store Profile, Security, Calendar, Integrations, Help Center - NO Notifications or SMS/Email Toggle). Help Center redesign verified: Search bar replaces category pills, AI chat toggle (sparkle icon) changes placeholder to 'Ask a question...', AI responses use GPT-5.2 via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY and return markdown-formatted step-by-step instructions in chat bubble format.
